knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL T9-033-API-Gateway-Integration Control Catalog
knowledgeAssets.summary: The deterministic controls for this package. Enforced as executable rules: IH-016 (the universal AI-execution-boundary / cross-tenant controls). The remaining controls are carried here for traceability; detailed field-vs-literal rule tuning is a follow-up (see the hand-authored T9-001..010 packages for the target).
knowledgeAssets.contentText: IH-001 API registration | Governance | Require documented compliance: API registration | Critical | Architecture. IH-002 Versioning | Governance | Require documented compliance: Versioning | Critical | Architecture. IH-003 Authentication | Governance | Require documented compliance: Authentication | Critical | Architecture. IH-004 Authorization | Governance | Require documented compliance: Authorization | Critical | Architecture. IH-005 Rate limiting | Governance | Require documented compliance: Rate limiting | Critical | Architecture. IH-006 Schema validation | Governance | Require documented compliance: Schema validation | Critical | Architecture. IH-007 Transformation approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Transformation approval | Critical | Architecture. IH-008 Event routing | Governance | Require documented compliance: Event routing | Critical | Architecture. IH-009 Connector approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Connector approval | Critical | Architecture. IH-010 Secrets management | Governance | Require documented compliance: Secrets management | Critical | Architecture. IH-011 Idempotency | Governance | Require documented compliance: Idempotency | Critical | Architecture. IH-012 Retry policy | Governance | Require documented compliance: Retry policy | Critical | Architecture. IH-013 Dead-letter handling | Governance | Require documented compliance: Dead-letter handling | Critical | Architecture. IH-014 Observability | Governance | Require documented compliance: Observability | Critical | Architecture. IH-015 Data masking | Governance | Require documented compliance: Data masking | Critical | Architecture. IH-016 Cross-tenant denial | Preventive | Deny cross-tenant access | High | Security. IH-017 Deprecation | Governance | Require documented compliance: Deprecation | High | Architecture. IH-018 Backward compatibility | Governance | Require documented compliance: Backward compatibility | High | Architecture. IH-019 SLA monitoring | Detective | Flag/alert on detected condition | High | Architecture. IH-020 Circuit breaker | Governance | Require documented compliance: Circuit breaker | High | Architecture. IH-021 Audit trail | Evidence | Require documented evidence: Audit trail | High | Architecture. IH-022 Provider failover | Governance | Require documented compliance: Provider failover | High | Architecture. IH-023 Change approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Change approval | High | Architecture. IH-024 Recovery | Corrective | Execute recovery/rollback procedure | High | Architecture. IH-025 Security testing | Governance | Require documented compliance: Security testing | High | Architecture.
